hooks.command: jq -c --arg event PreToolUse '. + {event: $event}' | curl -sS -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- http://localhost:9999/event > /dev/null 2>&1; exit 0
jq -c --arg event PostToolUse '. + {event: $event}' | curl -sS -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- http://localhost:9999/event > /dev/null 2>&1; exit 0
jq -c --arg event UserPromptSubmit '. + {event: $event}' | curl -sS -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- http://localhost:9999/event > /dev/null 2>&1; exit 0
jq -c --arg event Stop '. + {event: $event}' | curl -sS -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- http://localhost:9999/event > /dev/null 2>&1; exit 0
